text:
<<On Fri, 16 Jul 1999 09:10:02 -0700 (PDT), John Polstra <jdp@polstra.com> said:

>  Yes, it's a bug.  The patch has the right idea but it isn't quite
>  right in all the details.  For example, in the first chunk of the
>  patch:
 
>  Also, in the second chunk of the patch, under case 3, there's a bug.
>  The line should read:
 
Actually, the whole function should be rewritten to use strtoul()
rather than hand-rolling Yet Another integer parser.

-GAWollman
